items.title: Greetings — 挨拶

items.desc: 1–10,000, counters for objects (つ・個), people (人), age

items.desc: Topic marker は vs subject marker が — the key distinction

items.desc: Classify verbs and learn dictionary form

items.desc: Connect actions, make requests, express ongoing actions ～ている

items.desc: Describing things, conjugation: past and negative forms

items.desc: Hours, minutes, days, months and time phrases

items.title: Directions & Location
items.desc: うえ、した、となり、まえ、うしろ — spatial language

items.desc: Prices, asking costs, making purchases in Japanese
